summary: Trimmed the chapter to end on Mira's illicit sign-out of the damaged frame so the Blue Hour Laundry material remains with the next chapter's boundary. Added a brief closing bridge to Sloan's number for a cleaner handoff.
edits: Removed the Blue Hour Laundry and repair sequence that overlapped the next chapter opening.
Removed the post-repair claims-resolution aftermath tied to that same overrun.
Tightened the closing beat so chapter 2 ends on Mira taking the body out under a false waste-transfer code with Sloan's number in her wallet.
